countries.evidence: An online cross-sectional study was carried out in three cities in Vietnam (Hanoi, Tuyen Quang, and Can Tho)...

fieldwork_year.evidence: An online cross-sectional study was carried out in three cities in Vietnam (Hanoi, Tuyen Quang, and Can Tho) from September to October 2021.

gender_split.evidence: Regarding socio-demographic characteristics, the majority of the participants resided in urban areas (91.5%), were students (92.9%), and were female (57.0%). [Table 1]

sample_size.evidence: Among 1850 participants, the majority were students (92.9%), urban residents (91.5%), and females (57.0%).
